project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21) - MFC
comment:
Tool data downloaded, Data looks good for the 2 passes logged. Tool failed to close at surface. MIT doesnt show any signs of damage
Plan today complete Post cal and failure investigation

project: PRJ03262 - SLB - SLB Denmark - DFA16 (MFA-16)_DFA18 (MFA-18) - MFC
comment: Ran brush last night. String checks to be done today. Once access to container established. Most likely next run is expected to be smaller sized broach. Which should arrive at some point today.

project: PRJ03277 - Perenco - Wytch Farm - F-02 - MFC
comment: MFC24 run completed. Data ok. Data delivered to client. Plan for tomorrow is clean up tool string, fit checks and check MFC60 for next run schedule on sunday

project: PRJ03262 - SLB - SLB Denmark - DFA16 (MFA-16)_DFA18 (MFA-18) - MFC
comment: Arrived 4pm onboard conducted induction. Issue with accessibility still ongoing due to scale. Plan is to run a smaller broach size tomorrow. String checks to be completed in the morning.
